objective: Optimize total simulated damage over the 120s Wuwa DPS simulator episode.
final_metric: total_damage and DPS over the normal 120s simulation
action_mask_description: Action masks remove invalid policy actions such as cooldown-gated skills, resource-gated skills, unavailable swaps, and invalid state actions. Masks prevent illegal moves but do not tell PPO which valid route is best.

curriculum_modes.none: Normal reset. This is the default evaluation condition.
curriculum_modes.aemeath_ready_for_lynae: Training reset with active Aemeath and Aemeath Concerto ready so swap_to_lynae can expose Lynae Intro reward immediately.
curriculum_modes.lynae_after_intro: Training reset that executes Aemeath Concerto swap_to_lynae and starts after Lynae Intro.
curriculum_modes.lynae_kaleidoscopic_ready: Training reset that executes Aemeath Concerto swap_to_lynae, Lynae resonance skill, and Spark Collision to start inside Kaleidoscopic Parade with full Lumiflow.
curriculum_modes.mixed_lynae_curriculum: Training reset that samples among none and Lynae curriculum states with the env RNG/seed.

curriculum_training_only_note: curriculum reset is training-only; final fair evaluation should use curriculum_reset_mode = none unless explicitly studying curriculum starts.
trust_notes: The model is an RL-discovered policy under the simulator's current assumptions, not a mathematical proof of the optimal rotation.
No manual use-Lynae reward bonus is applied by default.
Action masks prevent illegal actions; they do not encode the best Lynae route.
known_limitations: Movement, stamina, continuous positioning, and some animation-cancel details are simplified.
Long delayed-reward branches may require curriculum, entropy, longer training, macro actions, or additional diagnostics.
Simulator output is only as reliable as the current action data, transition data, source refs, and implemented mechanics.
stale_model_warning: old PPO models before Lynae fixes are stale; old PPO models before Lynae transition, reward exposure, observation, and source-ref fixes should not be compared with new results.
old_model_invalidation_note: Retrain or continue-training from a compatible checkpoint after Lynae transition/observation/source fixes; do not treat older Aemeath/Mornye-only local optima as current evidence.
